parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ records: $input.all().map(item => ({ fields: { 'Order #': item.json.orderNum, Customer: item.json.Customer, Email: item.json.Email, Phone: item.json.Phone, Address: item.json.Address, Product: item.json.Product, Total: item.json.Total, Payment: item.json.Payment, Shipping: item.json.Shipping, Category: item.json.Category, Summary: item.json.Summary, 'Order Status': item.json.Summary, Received: item.json.Received } })) }) }}
